query:
SELECT ci.id, ci.name, ci.price, cg.name as groupName 
FROM complementItems ci 
INNER JOIN complementGroups cg ON ci.groupId = cg.id 
INNER JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id 
WHERE p.name = 'X-TUDO' AND p.establishmentId = 30001
ORDER BY cg.sortOrder, ci.sortOrder;
